Dialog.name: SEL_001_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was asked to check in on you.

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}I was just cleaning my room. Sorry, was it too loud?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh, was I making too much noise?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Sorry, I was cleaning... I hope no one was complaining.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Sorry, I knocked over some stuff while I was cleaning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I guess sound travels really well around here. I'll be more careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Actually, there's something I'd like to talk about. Will you come in?[n]{f 1 1}
